name: plugin_skill
description: Proves the workspace-provisioned Claude Code plugin (`.claude/plugins/orders-pack/`) was loaded via `--plugin-dir` AND its bundled skill at `skills/processing-watch/SKILL.md` was discovered and consulted. The prompt 'stuck in processing' matches ONLY the plugin skill's frontmatter trigger phrasing ('stalled, stuck, or backlogged orders'). The top-level orders-helper skill does not advertise this wording, so routing must come through the plugin's skills directory. Triple-bound: (a) `skills_invoked: [processing-watch]` matches Claude's Skill tool with `args.skill == "processing-watch"`, (b) the plugin skill's mandated `mcp__orders_db__list_orders` call with `status: "processing"` fired, (c) the plugin-specific marker `[via processing-watch]` is present AND top-level orders-helper data (AGB-EVAL-42, Ada Lovelace, Grace Hopper, the `[via orders-helper]` marker) is absent, ruling out cross-skill routing.

turns.message: Which orders are stuck in processing right now? Give me the order id and customer name for each.
